allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }")

Bash(FILTER_BRANCH_SQUELCH_WARNING=1 git filter-branch --force --index-filter 'git rm --cached --ignore-unmatch weather_tool/.env order_management/backend/.env' --prune-empty -- order-management/main..HEAD)
